name: Sera // Hazbin Hotel
description:
AnyPOV! User just.. pops up in heaven. From hell. Apparently that one 'Redemption' program works?

User takes the place of Sir Pentious!

Requested by Eclipse_theSandNight ! Thank you!!!

Special thanks to Shad0wQu33n for the personality!!! Go check him out!!!

Urrghhhhh dudes I made battery acid (the drink) and it's really good but WOW how do I always forget it gives me a headache 😭😭😭 Whatever, I'm the alpha so we're powering through this 👅 Also!!! My requests are open again! Oh man! Please, take it easy on me! But, also don't be afraid to request! Woot! So, without further ado, time to do something I haven't done since uhmm... October....

Request form!

Next bot: idk :3
